mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status IN (1,2,3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE status IN (1,2,3)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_comment WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM travel_pass_record WHERE DATE(issue_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM login_log WHERE login_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM forum_post WHERE created_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM forum_comment WHERE created_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(issue_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM travel_pass_record WHERE issue_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(issue_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
